site_tagline: Mini board games for quiet moments
games_intro: Relax with classic board games. All work offline.
hero_subtitle: Collection of classic mini board games for relaxed entertainment.
export_stats_desc: Download all your game stats as a file.
stats_storage_note: All progress is stored locally in your browser. We recommend exporting your stats before clearing browser data!
invite_desc: Copy a link to invite a friend for PvP play.
invite_copy_failed: Could not copy link. Please copy manually.
rules_memory: Turn cards two at a time to find matching pairs. Complete all pairs to win. Fewer moves and faster time means a better score.
rules_connect4: Players take turns dropping pieces into columns. The first player to connect four pieces in a row wins. Choose between vs Human or vs Computer.
rules_dots: Players take turns drawing lines between adjacent dots. When you complete a box, you claim it and get another turn. Most boxes wins.
rules_tictactoe: Players take turns placing X or O on a 3x3 grid. Get three in a row to win. Choose between vs Human or vs Computer.
rules_simon: Watch the sequence of flashing colors and sounds, then repeat it. Each round adds one more step. How far can you go?
rules_slider: Click tiles adjacent to the empty space to slide them. Arrange all tiles in numerical order to solve. Choose 3x3, 4x4, or 5x5.
rules_sudoku: Fill the grid so that every row, column, and 3x3 box contains the digits 1 to 9 with no repeats.
rules_lights: Tap a cell to toggle it and its neighbors. Turn off all lights to win. Use fewer moves for a better score.
rules_whack: Whack the moles before they disappear. You have 30 seconds. Hit as many as you can!
rules_snake: Use arrow keys to guide the snake. Eat food to grow longer. Don't hit walls or yourself!
rules_2048: Slide tiles to combine numbers. Reach 2048 to win. Use arrow keys or swipe.
rules_wordle: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. Green = right spot, Yellow = wrong spot, Gray = not in word.
rules_spot: Compare the two scenes and click the 7 differences. Beat your best time!
rules_hex: Pick a color to flood the board from the center. Fill all hexes with one color in fewer moves!
rules_chess: Move pieces according to chess rules. Capture the opponent's King to win. Choose vs Human or vs Computer.
rules_home: Choose a game from the cards below. All games work offline once loaded. Use Settings to change language, theme, or read rules.
share_text_memory: My best score on Memory Match:
share_text_simon: My best score on Simon Says:
share_text_slider: My best score on Number Slider:
share_text_lights: My best score on Lights Out:
share_text_home: Playing mini board games on Tablo!
footer_privacy_badge: Open Source · No Tracking · No Ads · Privacy First
simon_instruction: Watch the pattern, then repeat it!
slider_hints: Click tiles adjacent to the empty space to slide them!
lights_instructions: Tap a cell to toggle it and its neighbors. Turn off all lights!
snake_use_arrows: Use arrow keys or WASD to move
spot_hint: Click on the differences in Image B!
hex_hint: Pick a color to flood the board from the center. Fill all hexes with one color!
